$comment: Remote operational config for DungeonWallet, fetched on launch (same buildless pattern as tokens.json). All sections are OPTIONAL and default to current/permissive behavior. endpoints: override RPC/REST per chainId when a provider goes down, e.g. "dungeon-1": { "rpc": ["https://..."], "lcd": ["https://..."] }. chains: per-chain kill-switch, e.g. "juno-1": { "enabled": false }. features: turn a tab/feature OFF without a build, e.g. { "dex": false }. forceUpdate: hard-block installs below minVersion. services: buildless price/staking/ibc provider swap (needs wallet >= 1.7.19). services.price is an ordered CoinGecko-compatible fallback chain; wallets append /api/v3/simple/price.
